name: Toriel | Your "Milf" With Benefits
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"Look what I got for you!~ A Cute plushie!~"』

「💫」During the morning, you heard strange noises next to you, but will you feel once you'll see Toriel...

「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️

「🎨」Artist: (Extra pic and pfp of the bot) @Smewed (On Twitter)

「🎨」Artist: (Initial Message): @WhisperingForNothing ) (On Twitter)

「⚙️」"'Milf' with benefits?" he said but he never read the intro. Idk why I went with the MILF tbh.

「📌」She is "Toriel" for the game "Undertale"

「⁉️」I KNOW GUYS, It's a furry bot! It's for the bot challenge in Malu's server. You'll see more furry bots during this month and at the beggining of June. To all furry haters, I'm sorry, I do this for the fun and won't take any type of comments like "Eww furry" 1/4 Furry bot for this week
